anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1116: Ancient Weapons Revealed!
anime_pulse_items.summary: Eiichiro Oda drops a bombshell revealing the true purpose of Poseidon, Pluton, and Uranus. Fans are theorizing how this ties to the Void Century. Chapter sales already breaking records on Manga Plus.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note Gets New Anime Film: 'The C-Kira Incident'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Madhouse announces a new Death Note film set 10 years after the original. Light's notebook resurfaces, and a new Kira emerges. Trailer drops tomorrow at 10 AM JST.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto x Boruto: Next Generations – New Arc 'The Otsutsuki War'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto manga reveals Kawaki's true plan and the return of Kaguya. Anime adaptation confirmed for Fall 2026. Fans debating if this beats the Momoshiki arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Super: Manga Returns with 'Black Frieza Saga'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Toyotarou launches a new arc where Frieza invades Universe 7. Goku and Vegeta train with Whis for new transformations. Chapter 1 drops May 1st.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: 'Shibuya Incident' Finale Sets Record
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA delivers the most brutal episode yet with Gojo's sealing. Worldwide trending #1 on Twitter. Season 4 confirmed for 2027 covering the Culling Game.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Arc Movie Trilogy – First Trailer
anime_pulse_items.summary: Ufotable releases stunning trailer for the first movie covering the Infinity Castle battle. Dubbed 'most ambitious anime project ever'. Opens December 2026 worldwide.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: 'School Castes' Spin-off Gets Anime Adaptation
anime_pulse_items.summary: WIT Studio adapts the comedic alternate universe where the Survey Corps are high school students. Premieres July 2026. Fans divided but curious.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia: Final Arc – 'The War on All For One'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Manga enters its climax with Deku vs. Shigaraki. Chapter 400 reveals the true origin of One For All. Ending expected by late 2026. Fan theories flooding Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: 'Reze Arc' Premieres on Crunchyroll
anime_pulse_items.summary: First episode drops today with high-octane action and emotional twists. MAPPA's animation praised. New opening theme by Kenshi Yonezu.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Code: White Movie Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: The film grosses over $200 million globally in its first week. Fans adore the original story with Yor's backstory. Sequel movie announced for 2027.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Season 2 Confirmed for 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: After sweeping the Anime Awards, Madhouse greenlights season 2. Teaser shows new adventures with Stark and Fern. Manga sales skyrocket.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: 'Jeju Island Arc' – Anime vs Manhwa Debate
anime_pulse_items.summary: A-1 Pictures adapts the iconic ant arc. Fans compare animation to the manhwa's art. Episode 3 features Jin-Woo's first S-rank fight. Trending on Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Announces 10 New Simulcasts for Spring 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Including 'Kaiju No. 8' season 2, 'Oshi no Ko' season 3, and 'Hell's Paradise' season 2. Full schedule released. Fans celebrate no delays.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'One Piece' Live-Action Season 2 Casts Baroque Works
anime_pulse_items.summary: New actors for Crocodile, Mr. 2, and Robin revealed. Filming begins May 2026. Fans optimistic after season 1 success.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note Manga Reread Trends as New Film Approaches
anime_pulse_items.summary: Viz Media reports 500% spike in digital sales. Fans revisit the original to spot foreshadowing. Subreddit hits 3 million subscribers.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO Sales Exceed 10 Million Units
anime_pulse_items.summary: Bandai Namco's hit fighter gets new DLC with Granolah and Gas. Competitive scene explodes. EVO 2026 features main stage tournament.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Manga Ends Next Month – Final Chapter May 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Gege Akutami announces the manga will conclude in 5 chapters. Fans brace for Yuji vs. Sukuna finale. Theories about Itadori's fate flood Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Anime Awards 2026: Frieren Wins Anime of the Year
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren also takes Best Director and Best Score. Chainsaw Man wins Best Action. Ceremony draws 10 million viewers worldwide.
